from PIL import Image

for fname, label in [
    \('1f7905f7-3738-4086-8462-105c259bcccf.png', 'HOME'\),
    \('1a8c199b-d787-4024-a7b9-d60acc8862fc.png', 'AWAY'\),
]:
    img = Image.open\(f'/Users/nocap/Downloads/{fname}'\).convert\('RGB'\)
    w, h = img.size
    print\(f'\\n{label}: {w}x{h}'\)

    # Find horizontal white bands
    h_bands = []
    in_band = False; bs = 0
    for y in range\(h\):
        row = img.crop\(\(0, y, w, y+1\)\)
        pixels = list\(row.getdata\(\)\)
        avg = sum\(r+g+b for r,g,b in pixels\) / \(len\(pixels\)*3\)
        if avg > 248 and not in_band:
            in_band = True; bs = y
        elif avg <= 248 and in_band:
            in_band = False
            if y - bs > 15: h_bands.append\(\(bs, y\)\)
    print\('H bands:', h_bands[:12]\)

    # Find vertical white bands at midpoint
    v_bands = []
    in_band = False; bs = 0
    mid_y = h // 4
    for x in range\(w\):
        col = img.crop\(\(x, mid_y, x+1, mid_y + h//4\)\)
        pixels = list\(col.getdata\(\)\)
        avg = sum\(r+g+b for r,g,b in pixels\) / \(len\(pixels\)*3\)
        if avg > 248 and not in_band:
            in_band = True; bs = x
        elif avg <= 248 and in_band:
            in_band = False
            if x - bs > 15: v_bands.append\(\(bs, x\)\)
    print\('V bands:', v_bands[:6]\)
EOF)

import urllib.request, json, os, time
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

OUT = '/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public/jerseys/external'

# Fetch all products from jerseygame.store to get original CDN image URLs
all_products = []
for page in range\(1, 5\):
    url = f'https://jerseygame.store/products.json?limit=250&page={page}'
    req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=15\) as r:
        data = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
    prods = data.get\('products', []\)
    if not prods:
        break
    all_products.extend\(prods\)
    print\(f'Page {page}: {len\(prods\)} products \(total: {len\(all_products\)}\)'\)

print\(f'\\nTotal products: {len\(all_products\)}'\)

# Build download list: \(handle, img_index, cdn_url, local_path\)
tasks = []
for p in all_products:
    handle = p['handle']
    images = p.get\('images', []\)
    for i, img in enumerate\(images[:2], start=1\):
        src = img['src'].split\('?'\)[0]  # strip query params
        local = f'{OUT}/{handle}-{i}.jpg'
        tasks.append\(\(handle, i, src, local\)\)

print\(f'Images to re-download: {len\(tasks\)}'\)

def download\(task\):
    handle, idx, url, local_path = task
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=20\) as r:
            data = r.read\(\)
        with open\(local_path, 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(data\)
        return True, handle, idx
    except Exception as e:
        return False, handle, idx

ok = fail = 0
with ThreadPoolExecutor\(max_workers=20\) as ex:
    for success, handle, idx in ex.map\(download, tasks\):
        if success:
            ok += 1
        else:
            fail += 1
        if \(ok + fail\) % 100 == 0:
            print\(f'  {ok+fail}/{len\(tasks\)} done \({fail} failed\)...'\)

print\(f'\\nDone: {ok} restored, {fail} failed'\)
PYEOF)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np, os

badge_dir = '/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public/badges'

def tight_crop\(img_path\):
    img = Image.open\(img_path\).convert\('RGB'\)
    arr = np.array\(img\)
    
    # Detect background: sample corners to get bg color
    corners = [arr[0,0], arr[0,-1], arr[-1,0], arr[-1,-1]]
    bg = np.mean\(corners, axis=0\)
    
    # Find pixels that differ from background by more than threshold
    diff = np.abs\(arr.astype\(float\) - bg\).max\(axis=2\)
    mask = diff > 20  # pixels that are part of the badge
    
    rows = np.where\(mask.any\(axis=1\)\)[0]
    cols = np.where\(mask.any\(axis=0\)\)[0]
    
    if len\(rows\) == 0 or len\(cols\) == 0:
        return  # nothing to crop
    
    r0, r1 = rows[0], rows[-1]
    c0, c1 = cols[0], cols[-1]
    
    # Add 8% padding on each side
    h, w = arr.shape[:2]
    pad_r = max\(8, int\(\(r1 - r0\) * 0.08\)\)
    pad_c = max\(8, int\(\(c1 - c0\) * 0.08\)\)
    
    r0 = max\(0, r0 - pad_r\)
    r1 = min\(h, r1 + pad_r\)
    c0 = max\(0, c0 - pad_c\)
    c1 = min\(w, c1 + pad_c\)
    
    # Make it square \(expand shorter side\)
    ch = r1 - r0
    cw = c1 - c0
    if ch < cw:
        diff = cw - ch
        r0 = max\(0, r0 - diff // 2\)
        r1 = min\(h, r1 + diff - diff // 2\)
    elif cw < ch:
        diff = ch - cw
        c0 = max\(0, c0 - diff // 2\)
        c1 = min\(w, c1 + diff - diff // 2\)
    
    cropped = img.crop\(\(c0, r0, c1, r1\)\)
    # Save as square 400x400
    cropped = cropped.resize\(\(400, 400\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    cropped.save\(img_path\)

files = [f for f in os.listdir\(badge_dir\) if f.endswith\('.png'\)]
for f in files:
    tight_crop\(os.path.join\(badge_dir, f\)\)
    print\(f'  ✓ {f}'\)

print\(f'\\nDone: {len\(files\)} badges re-cropped'\)
EOF)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np, os

badge_dir = '/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public/badges'

def retrim\(img_path\):
    img = Image.open\(img_path\).convert\('RGB'\)
    arr = np.array\(img\)
    # Use slightly stricter threshold to catch tile border artifacts
    corners = [arr[0,0], arr[0,-1], arr[-1,0], arr[-1,-1]]
    bg = np.mean\(corners, axis=0\)
    diff = np.abs\(arr.astype\(float\) - bg\).max\(axis=2\)
    mask = diff > 30
    rows = np.where\(mask.any\(axis=1\)\)[0]
    cols = np.where\(mask.any\(axis=0\)\)[0]
    if len\(rows\) == 0 or len\(cols\) == 0: return
    r0,r1 = rows[0],rows[-1]
    c0,c1 = cols[0],cols[-1]
    h,w = arr.shape[:2]
    pad = 12
    r0,r1 = max\(0,r0-pad\),min\(h,r1+pad\)
    c0,c1 = max\(0,c0-pad\),min\(w,c1+pad\)
    ch,cw = r1-r0,c1-c0
    if ch<cw: d=cw-ch; r0=max\(0,r0-d//2\); r1=min\(h,r1+d-d//2\)
    elif cw<ch: d=ch-cw; c0=max\(0,c0-d//2\); c1=min\(w,c1+d-d//2\)
    result = img.crop\(\(c0,r0,c1,r1\)\).resize\(\(400,400\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    result.save\(img_path\)

for f in os.listdir\(badge_dir\):
    if f.endswith\('.png'\):
        retrim\(os.path.join\(badge_dir, f\)\)

print\(f"Re-trimmed {len\(os.listdir\(badge_dir\)\)} badges"\)

def center_badge\(name\):
    path = os.path.join\(BADGES_DIR, name\)
    img = Image.open\(path\).convert\('RGB'\)
    arr = np.array\(img\)
    
    r, g, b = arr[:,:,0].astype\(float\), arr[:,:,1].astype\(float\), arr[:,:,2].astype\(float\)
    brightness = \(r + g + b\) / 3
    cmax = np.maximum\(np.maximum\(r, g\), b\)
    cmin = np.minimum\(np.minimum\(r, g\), b\)
    sat = np.where\(cmax > 0, \(cmax - cmin\) / cmax, 0\)
    
    active = \(sat > 0.20\) | \(brightness < 160\)
    
    if not active.any\(\):
        return
    
    rows = np.where\(np.any\(active, axis=1\)\)[0]
    cols = np.where\(np.any\(active, axis=0\)\)[0]
    r0, r1 = int\(rows[0]\), int\(rows[-1]\)
    c0, c1 = int\(cols[0]\), int\(cols[-1]\)
    
    # Crop to bounding box with 12% padding, then center on white canvas
    pad_r = int\(\(r1 - r0\) * 0.12\)
    pad_c = int\(\(c1 - c0\) * 0.12\)
    
    crop = img.crop\(\(
        max\(0, c0 - pad_c\),
        max\(0, r0 - pad_r\),
        min\(400, c1 + pad_c + 1\),
        min\(400, r1 + pad_r + 1\)
    \)\)
    
    side = max\(crop.size\)
    result = Image.new\('RGB', \(side, side\), \(255, 255, 255\)\)
    result.paste\(crop, \(\(side - crop.width\) // 2, \(side - crop.height\) // 2\)\)
    result = result.resize\(\(400, 400\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    result.save\(path\)
    print\(f"  Centered: {name} \(content was {c0},{r0}-{c1},{r1}\)"\)

for name in ['jersey-borussia-monchengladbach.png', 'jersey-lyon.png', 'jersey-juventus.png']:
    center_badge\(name\)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np
import os

# Save all cells from image 38 for visual inspection

def find_card_bottom\(arr, bg\):
    h = arr.shape[0]
    diff = np.abs\(arr.astype\(int\) - bg\).max\(axis=2\)
    bg_row = \(diff <= 20\).mean\(axis=1\)
    search_start = int\(h * 0.5\)
    for r in range\(search_start, h\):
        if bg_row[r] > 0.95:
            return r
    return h

def extract_card\(img, x1, y1, x2, y2\):
    cell = img.crop\(\(x1, y1, x2, y2\)\)
    arr = np.array\(cell\)
    bg = arr[2, 2].astype\(float\)
    card_bottom = find_card_bottom\(arr, bg\)
    card = cell.crop\(\(0, 0, cell.width, card_bottom\)\)
    card_arr = np.array\(card\)
    diff = np.abs\(card_arr.astype\(int\) - bg\).max\(axis=2\)
    content = diff > 20
    if not np.any\(content\) or content.sum\(\) / content.size < 0.01:
        return None
    rows = np.any\(content, axis=1\)
    cols = np.any\(content, axis=0\)
    top = max\(0, np.argmax\(rows\) - 15\)
    bottom = min\(card_arr.shape[0], card_arr.shape[0] - np.argmax\(rows[::-1]\) + 15\)
    left = max\(0, np.argmax\(cols\) - 15\)
    right = min\(card_arr.shape[1], card_arr.shape[1] - np.argmax\(cols[::-1]\) + 15\)
    cropped = card.crop\(\(left, top, right, bottom\)\)
    cw, ch = cropped.size
    size = max\(cw, ch\)
    bg_color = tuple\(arr[2, 2]\)
    square = Image.new\('RGB', \(size, size\), bg_color\)
    square.paste\(cropped, \(\(size - cw\) // 2, \(size - ch\) // 2\)\)
    return square.resize\(\(200, 200\), Image.LANCZOS\)

from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

img71 = Image.open\('/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - Arcads image asset \(71\).png'\).convert\('RGB'\)

col_bounds = [\(69, 447\), \(487, 866\), \(907, 1287\), \(1327, 1711\), \(1747, 2127\)]
row_bounds = [\(1208, 1895\), \(1974, 2660\)]
labels_row1 = ['cameroon', 'chile', 'egypt', 'flamengo', 'hungary']
labels_row2 = ['jordan', 'new-zealand', 'olympiakos', 'peru', 'sweden']
out_base = '/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public/badges'

def extract_logo\(x1, y1, x2, y2, name\):
    card_full = img71.crop\(\(x1, y1, x2, y2\)\)
    arr_full = np.array\(card_full\)
    h_full, w = arr_full.shape[:2]
    
    # Find text start
    text_start = h_full
    for ri in range\(h_full//2, h_full\):
        dark = np.sum\(arr_full[ri, :, :].mean\(axis=1\) < 80\)
        if dark > w * 0.05:
            text_start = ri - 5
            break
    
    card = np.array\(img71.crop\(\(x1, y1, x2, y1 + text_start\)\)\)
    h, w = card.shape[:2]
    r, g, b = card[:,:,0].astype\(int\), card[:,:,1].astype\(int\), card[:,:,2].astype\(int\)
    
    # Detect background \(gray-ish\): all channels similar AND in 180-252 range
    ch_diff = np.maximum\(np.maximum\(np.abs\(r-g\), np.abs\(r-b\)\), np.abs\(g-b\)\)
    is_bg = \(ch_diff < 15\) & \(r > 180\) & \(r < 252\)
    
    # Replace bg with white
    clean = card.copy\(\)
    clean[is_bg] = [255, 255, 255]
    
    # Now find non-white pixels for bounds
    c_r, c_g, c_b = clean[:,:,0].astype\(int\), clean[:,:,1].astype\(int\), clean[:,:,2].astype\(int\)
    is_logo = ~\(\(c_r > 240\) & \(c_g > 240\) & \(c_b > 240\)\)
    
    rows = np.any\(is_logo, axis=1\)
    cols = np.any\(is_logo, axis=0\)
    
    if not rows.any\(\):
        print\(f"  {name}: No logo found"\)
        return
    
    rmin, rmax = np.where\(rows\)[0][[0, -1]]
    cmin, cmax = np.where\(cols\)[0][[0, -1]]
    
    pad = 30
    rmin = max\(0, rmin - pad\)
    rmax = min\(h - 1, rmax + pad\)
    cmin = max\(0, cmin - pad\)
    cmax = min\(w - 1, cmax + pad\)
    
    logo = Image.fromarray\(clean[rmin:rmax+1, cmin:cmax+1]\)
    
    target = 300
    scale = target / max\(logo.width, logo.height\)
    new_w = int\(logo.width * scale\)
    new_h = int\(logo.height * scale\)
    logo_r = logo.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    
    canvas = Image.new\('RGB', \(400, 400\), \(255, 255, 255\)\)
    canvas.paste\(logo_r, \(\(400-new_w\)//2, \(400-new_h\)//2\)\)
    canvas.save\(f"{out_base}/jersey-{name}.png"\)
    print\(f"  {name}: OK, logo size {logo.size} -> {logo_r.size}"\)

print\("Row 1:"\)
for name, \(x1,x2\) in zip\(labels_row1, col_bounds\):

        w, h = img.size

    # Crop to target aspect ratio \(4:5\) from center
    target_ratio = TARGET_W / TARGET_H
